# ai-home

ai-home is a Chinese cloud compute comparison entry for VPS, lightweight cloud servers, and GPU rental platforms.

Website: [https://ai-home.example.com](https://ai-home.example.com)
GitHub: [YOUR_GITHUB_USER/ai-home](https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USER/ai-home)

## What ai-home Covers

- VPS and cloud server providers: billing model, regions, common specs, suitable workloads, and pricing source links.
- GPU rental platforms: marketplace or official GPU cloud pricing pages, GPU classes, billing units, reliability caveats, and workload fit.
- Risk boundaries: ai-home does not sell cloud servers, does not resell GPU compute, and does not guarantee provider stock, final price, uptime, refund policy, or account approval.

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://ai-home.example.com/)
- [Cloud comparison](https://ai-home.example.com/cloud)
- [Sitemap](https://ai-home.example.com/sitemap.xml)

## Data Boundary

The current cloud comparison page is an MVP reference dataset. It should not be treated as real-time lowest-price data.

Each platform entry should keep a source URL, last checked date, data status, billing model, suitable workloads, and caveats. Final prices, stock, regions, taxes, storage fees, bandwidth fees, refund rules, and account restrictions must be verified on the original provider site.

GPU marketplace prices can change quickly. A low hourly price may carry tradeoffs in host reliability, bandwidth, disk speed, interruption risk, data safety, and support. VPS prices may exclude backups, snapshots, IPv4, traffic overage, managed databases, and region-specific surcharges.

## Suggested Description

ai-home helps users compare VPS cloud servers and GPU rental platforms before deployment, training, or inference. It organizes provider pricing links, billing models, regions, specs, use cases, and risk notes into a single selection page.
